nasb.text: “Son of man, say to the leader of Tyre, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Because your heart is lifted up And you have said, ‘I am a god, I sit in the seat of gods In the heart of the seas’; Yet you are a man and not God, Although you make your heart like the heart of God—

esv.text: “Son of man, say to the prince of Tyre, Thus says the Lord God: “Because your heart is proud, and you have said, ‘I am a god, I sit in the seat of the gods, in the heart of the seas,’ yet you are but a man, and no god, though you make your heart like the heart of a god—

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要對推羅的君王說：‘主耶和華這樣說： 因為你心裡高傲， 說：我是神； 我在海的中心、 坐在神的寶座上。 其實你不過是人，並不是神， 你心裡卻自以為是神。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你去告诉泰尔王，主耶和华这样说， “‘你心里高傲，说，我是神， 我坐在海中神的宝座上。 你虽然自以为像神， 但事实上你不是神，不过是人。
